caption:
Your Instagram DMs are a lead channel.

Most owners treat them like a drawer they check at night.

A homeowner messages your page asking about price or availability. They're messaging two other shops in the same five minutes.

Open Meta Business Suite. Go to Inbox, then Automations, then Instant Reply. Turn it on. It fires the moment someone messages you for the first time, and it's free.

Write one line: ask for the job and the zip code. The lead qualifies itself before anyone responds.

The auto-reply buys time. It doesn't close anything. Someone on your team still has to read that DM and respond, inside the same window you'd use for a phone call.

Want every DM routed into follow-up this fast?

DM "SOCIAL".
#ServiceBusiness #SpeedToLead #SmallBusinessMarketing #LeadGeneration #HomeServices
rationale: Research shows shares/DM sends are the top-weighted 2026 ranking signal and reels remain the reach engine, so this post pairs a reach-friendly reel with a lead channel (Instagram DMs) this account hasn't covered, using a verified native Meta feature (Instant Reply) instead of a vague tip.
